examples: The infrared hotbox detection system that has being used in the railway transportation field in China has the problem of low reliability.
The main topic of this paper is the design of algorithm and software on the information processing of the Infrared Hotbox Detection System III (abbreviation as HBDS-III).
The information processing of HBDS-III includes four main modules: Counting of Axles and Cars, Temperature Computation, Rolling and Sliding Bearing Distinguishment, Hotbox Forecast.
